lineage.Process: CreateFeatureclass E:\ArcGIS\青海24\青海24.gdb Sheet1_XYTableToPoint54_PointsToLine 折线 # 否 否 "GEOGCS["GCS_WGS_1984",DATUM["D_WGS_1984",SPHEROID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]];-400 -400 1000000000;-100000 10000;-100000 10000;8.98315284119521E-09;0.001;0.001;IsHighPrecision" # 0 0 0 # 与模板相同
AddField E:\ArcGIS\青海24\青海24.gdb\Sheet1_XYTableToPoint54_PointsToLine 断面名称 String 0 0 255 断面名称 NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
PointsToLine Sheet1_XYTableToPoint54 E:\ArcGIS\青海24\青海24.gdb\Sheet1_XYTableToPoint54_PointsToLine 断面名称 断面名称 NO_CLOSE 构造连续线 无 #

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>河流名称</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>河流代码</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>断面类别</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>断面序号</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>审核汇集断面名称</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>断面编码</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>对象编码</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>

ExportFeatures 贵德防治对象+隐患点空间数据 F:\韩增红\给浩总上交\16县断面平面位置-防治对象+隐患点线空间数据\贵德图层+表格(断面平面位置属性完善后跑数据的）6.6\贵德断面平面位置.shp # NOT_USE_ALIAS "Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,贵德防治对象+隐患点空间数据,Shape_Length,-1,-1;断面名称 "断面名称" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,贵德防治对象+隐患点空间数据,断面名称,0,254;河流名称 "河流名称" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,贵德防治对象+隐患点空间数据,河流名称,0,254;河流代码 "河流代码" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,贵德防治对象+隐患点空间数据,河流代码,0,254;断面类别 "断面类别" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,贵德防治对象+隐患点空间数据,断面类别,0,254;断面序号 "断面序号" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,贵德防治对象+隐患点空间数据,断面序号,0,254;审核汇集断面名称 "审核汇集断面名称" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,贵德防治对象+隐患点空间数据,审核汇集断面名称,0,254;断面编码 "断面编码" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,贵德防治对象+隐患点空间数据,断面编码,0,254;对象编码 "对象编码" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,贵德防治对象+隐患点空间数据,对象编码,0,254" #
DeleteField 断面平面位置L 断面序;审核汇;对象编 删除字段

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.1.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\Users\HTHP-002\Desktop\dataCheck\2024年空间数据最终版\2024年空间数据最终版\16县断面平面位置-防治对象+隐患点线空间数据\贵德图层+表格(断面平面位置属性完善后跑数据的）6.6</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>贵德断面平面位置.shp</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><DeleteField><field_name>Shape_Leng</field_name></DeleteField></workflow></operationSequence>
